title: acalypha australis
intro: Acalypha australis, also known as the Australian copper leaf or copper leaf, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in herbal preparations to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as to treat wounds and skin irritations. In traditional herbal medicine, Acalypha australis is often prepared as a tea or tincture to harness its health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues.
